literal_translation: Inflammation of bone and bone marrow
brief_nursing_elaboration: Bone/marrow infection from bacterial hematogenous spread. Nursing: blood culture collection, IV antibiotics, pain management, limb elevation, infection precautions, wound care.
Tendon sheath inflammation from repetitive use/infection. Nursing: immobilization support, anti-inflammatory meds, ROM exercises, pain assessment, swelling monitoring.

literal_translation: Process of stopping abnormal heart fibrillation
brief_nursing_elaboration: Electrical therapy to restore normal rhythm. Nursing: pad placement, synchronization settings, medication admin pre/post, patient safety during shock delivery.
GI tract structure/disease category. Nursing: bowel assessment, diet modification, stool character monitoring, GERD/ulcer management, motility enhancement.
GI inflammation from viral/bacterial/food-borne. Nursing: anti-emetic admin, fluid/electrolyte replacement, stool assessment, hydration monitoring, isolation.
Thyroid removal for cancer/hyperthyroidism. Nursing: post-op hypothyroidism monitoring, hormone replacement, calcium/parathyroid assessment, voice changes evaluation.
Gallbladder removal for cholelithiasis. Nursing: post-op pain management, bile duct patency, diarrhea management, dietary fat restriction initially, wound care.
Uterus removal for cancer/fibroids/bleeding. Nursing: post-op pain, body image support, menopause symptoms if ovaries removed, wound care, activity restrictions.
Larynx removal for cancer. Nursing: permanent tracheostomy care, speech rehabilitation, body image support, airway management, psychological counseling.
Direct visualization of uterine cavity. Nursing: NPO status, post-op cramping, bleeding assessment, infection precautions, follow-up scheduling, biopsy results.
Lower colon visualization. Nursing: bowel prep, patient positioning, reassurance post-procedure, biopsy results, perforation precautions, infection prevention.
Minimally invasive chest/lung visualization. Nursing: chest tube drainage, breath sound assessment, pain management, respiratory status monitoring, infection prevention.
Radiographic visualization of bile ducts. Nursing: contrast reaction monitoring, iodine allergy assessment, post-procedure abdominal pain, pancreatitis precautions.
Infrared imaging of heat patterns. Nursing: room temperature consistency, patient preparation, inflammation/infection assessment, circulation evaluation.
Visualization of lymph nodes/vessels. Nursing: contrast reaction monitoring, allergy assessment, limb elevation post-procedure, swelling evaluation.
12-lead heart rhythm recording. Nursing: electrode placement, patient reassurance, immobility during recording, result interpretation, serial ECG comparison.
Brain wave recording for seizures. Nursing: electrode cap application, relaxed environment, sleep deprivation if required, seizure precautions.
Cartilage degeneration in weight-bearing joints. Nursing: pain management, ROM exercises, weight reduction, assistive devices, acetaminophen/NSAIDs admin.
Autoimmune polyarticular inflammation. Nursing: DMARD admin, immunosuppressive monitoring, CRP/ESR trending, joint damage prevention, splinting, psychological support.
Inherited disorder with numerous kidney cysts. Nursing: renal function monitoring, hypertension control, pain management, screening family members, end-stage renal disease preparation.
Parathyroid dysfunction causing hypocalcemia. Nursing: calcium supplementation, vitamin D admin, seizure precautions, ECG monitoring, symptom assessment.
Parathyroid overactivity causing hypercalcemia. Nursing: hydration with NS, diuretics, bisphosphonates, neurological monitoring, renal function assessment.
Severe hyperthyroidism/thyroid storm. Nursing: beta-blockers, PTU/methimazole admin, iodine solution, fever management, cardiac monitoring, anxiolytic support.
Thyroid hormone deficiency. Nursing: levothyroxine admin (take on empty stomach), TSH monitoring, energy assessment, weight management, cold intolerance education.
Thyroid hormone excess from Graves/toxic nodule. Nursing: beta-blockers, antithyroid meds, iodine solution, symptom management, weight monitoring, exophthalmos care if present.
Excessive endogenous/exogenous insulin. Nursing: blood glucose monitoring, carbohydrate intake, insulin adjustment, hypoglycemia precautions, education on recognition.
Aldosterone excess causing sodium retention/hypertension. Nursing: potassium monitoring, BP control, spironolactone admin, sodium restriction, electrolyte assessment.
Adrenal/extra-adrenal catecholamine tumor. Nursing: blood pressure monitoring, phentolamine admin, beta-blocker titration, urinary metanephrine monitoring, surgical preparation.
Pancreatic tumor producing excess gastrin. Nursing: PPI admin (high doses), H2-blocker support, diarrhea management, imaging coordination, surgical intervention prep.
Pancreatic beta-cell tumor producing excess insulin. Nursing: blood glucose monitoring, hypoglycemia precautions, surgical intervention, dextrose availability, symptom log.
Pancreatic tumor producing excess somatostatin. Nursing: steatorrhea management, diarrhea assessment, nutritional supplementation, diagnostic octreotide scan coordination.
Pancreatic tumor producing excess ADH causing SIADH. Nursing: fluid restriction, sodium monitoring, hyponatremia correction, seizure precautions.
Lymphoid malignancy (type of NHL). Nursing: chemotherapy coordination, CBC monitoring, infection precautions, nutritional support, psychosocial support.
Primary liver cancer from cirrhosis/hepatitis. Nursing: AFP monitoring, imaging follow-up, chemotherapy/radiation coordination, pain management, palliative care discussion.
Whipple procedure for pancreatic cancer. Nursing: post-op pain management, nutritional support, exocrine/endocrine replacement, blood glucose monitoring, complications assessment.
Low platelet count increasing bleeding risk. Nursing: bleeding precautions, platelet transfusion, petechiae assessment, stool guaiac monitoring, hemorrhage precautions.
Elevated platelet count increasing clotting risk. Nursing: antiplatelet meds, hydration encouragement, thrombosis precautions, underlying cause investigation.

literal_translation: True increase in red blood cells
brief_nursing_elaboration: Myeloproliferative disorder with RBC overproduction. Nursing: phlebotomy coordination, CBC monitoring, aspirin admin, hydration, thrombosis/hemorrhage precautions.
Severe neutropenia from drugs/disease. Nursing: strict infection precautions, granulocyte colony-stimulating factor, fever management, frequent monitoring, reverse isolation if severe.
Elevated lymphocyte count from infection/malignancy. Nursing: infection assessment, CBC trending, underlying cause investigation, antibiotic/chemotherapy coordination.
Elevated monocyte count from infection/inflammation. Nursing: infection assessment, CBC trending, WBC differential review, underlying cause investigation.
Elevated eosinophil count from allergy/parasites. Nursing: allergy assessment, parasitic infection screening, medication review, symptom evaluation, CBC monitoring.
Elevated basophil count (rare/mild). Nursing: CBC interpretation, underlying cause investigation, antihistamine consideration if symptomatic.
Low neutrophil count increasing infection risk. Nursing: infection precautions, G-CSF admin, fever monitoring, antibiotic prophylaxis, CBC trending.
Low lymphocyte count from HIV/immunosuppression. Nursing: infection precautions, immunization assessment, CD4 monitoring (if HIV), antiretroviral therapy coordination.
Low monocyte count (rare). Nursing: infection assessment, CBC trending, underlying cause investigation, immunocompromise evaluation.
Inherited/acquired hypercoagulable state. Nursing: anticoagulation therapy, thrombosis precautions, compression stocking, leg elevation, activity encouragement, genetic counseling.
Inherited clotting factor deficiency (A/B). Nursing: factor replacement, bleeding precautions, PT/INR monitoring, joint protection, emergency notification system.

prefix_meaning: Named after Erik von Willebrand - discoverer
brief_nursing_elaboration: Most common inherited bleeding disorder. Nursing: desmopressin admin, factor replacement, menstrual bleeding management, genetic counseling, bleeding precautions.
Life-threatening consumptive coagulopathy. Nursing: continuous monitoring, FFP/platelets/cryoprecipitate transfusion, antibiotic for sepsis, blood product management, bleeding precautions.
Autoimmune destruction of bile ducts. Nursing: UDCA admin, immunosuppressive meds, pruritus management, fat-soluble vitamin supplementation, liver transplant evaluation.
Bile duct fibrosis from autoimmune. Nursing: UDCA admin, cholangitis management, IBD screening/treatment, cholangiocarcinoma surveillance, liver transplant consideration.
Autoimmune liver inflammation. Nursing: corticosteroid admin, azathioprine/mycophenolate, LFT monitoring, immunosuppressive therapy coordination, cirrhosis assessment.
Cirrhosis from prolonged alcohol use. Nursing: alcohol cessation support, ascites management, variceal bleeding prevention, encephalopathy management, transplant evaluation.

literal_translation: Fat accumulation in liver without alcohol
brief_nursing_elaboration: Hepatic steatosis from metabolic syndrome. Nursing: weight loss encouragement, diabetes/lipid control, vitamin E consideration, lifestyle modification, cirrhosis precautions.

literal_translation: Liver scarring from bile duct disease
brief_nursing_elaboration: Cirrhosis from prolonged cholestasis. Nursing: UDCA admin, pruritus management, fat-soluble vitamin supplementation, cholangitis prevention, transplant evaluation.
Liver inflammation from HAV/HBV/HCV/HDV/HEV. Nursing: isolation (type-dependent), supportive care, monitoring, vaccination education, transmission prevention.
